Name: Kit Review
Description: Fields: photo (Image), quote (text), name (text), meta (text). Used by featured_reviews.

Name: Kit FAQ
Description: Fields: question (text), answer (multi-line). Used by featured_faqs.

Name: Kit Step
Description: Fields: title (text), description (multi-line), icon (Image). Used by featured_steps.

Name: Kit Component
Description: Fields: name (text), description (multi-line), icon (Image). Used by featured_components.

Name: Activity Items
Description: Hero activity row items. Each entry: "<emoji>|<text>".

Name: Benefits Items
Description: Hero "Why this kit" 2x2 benefits. Each entry: "<emoji>|<label>".

Name: Hero Trust Strip
Description: Short trust items shown below the ATC button.

Name: Help Note
Description: Helper text shown beside the size-chart link.

Name: Capacity
Description: Generic capacity label (e.g. 700ml / 2L / 1kg).

Name: Size Chart Image
Description: Image displayed inside the size-chart modal.

Name: Companion Size Product
Description: Sister product at a different capacity (700ml ↔ 1L).

Name: Cross-sell Products
Description: Up to 3 products in the Pair It With section.

Name: Comparison Left Image
Description: Comparison section — left card image.

Name: Comparison Right Image
Description: Comparison section — right card image.

Name: Box Image
Description: What's-in-the-Box section image.

Name: How to Make Video
Description: Demo video for the How-to-Make section (Video file).

Name: Hero Benefits Icons
Description: Icons for hero "Why this kit" 2x2 — same order as benefits_items.

Name: Benefits Icons
Description: Icons for Quick Benefits cards — same order as benefit blocks.

Name: Trust Strip Icons
Description: Icons for Trust Row — same order as trust_card blocks.

Name: Featured Reviews
Description: Per-product UGC reviews (kit_review metaobject).

Name: Featured FAQs
Description: Per-product FAQ items (kit_faq metaobject).

Name: Featured Steps
Description: Per-product How-to-Make steps (kit_step metaobject).

Name: Featured Components
Description: Per-product What's-in-the-Box components (kit_component metaobject).

Name: Jar Capacity
Description: Sprout-maker-only capacity label (700ml / 1000ml). Other kits use `capacity`.

Name: Jar Size Chart Image
Description: Sprout-maker-only size chart image. Other kits use `size_chart_image`.

Name: Best For
Description: Per-variant audience copy under BEST FOR.

Name: Variant Tag
Description: Optional badge above each variant card (e.g. TOP SELLER).
